_doc: Ground-truth happy-hour data the extractor MUST reproduce. Hand-verified from each venue's own page/PDF (date in `verifiedOn`). days = ISO 1=Mon..7=Sun. offeringKeywords = lowercase substrings that must appear in an extracted offering's name/description; recall = fraction found. Grow this set as new failure modes surface; it is the regression gate for any extractor change.

goldens.name: District Oakland
goldens.pageKind: PDF menu (deals live in a linked PDF)

goldens.name: Bei Sushi
goldens.pageKind: IMAGE menu (HH deals live in a happy-hour PNG, no text/PDF)

goldens.name: Milestone Tavern
goldens.pageKind: HH on a creatively-named page (/happenings) — tests triage nav discovery

goldens.name: Hula Hoops Restaurant & Tiki Bar
goldens.pageKind: operator find: HH window in page JSON; deals in a 6.9MB Dinner-menu PDF reached via HH-context link (needs 10MB doc budget)

goldens.name: The Cheesecake Factory
goldens.pageKind: operator find: HH menu on a client-rendered SPA reached from the location page (robots-blocked → needs headless render)

goldens.name: Sevy's Bar + Kitchen
goldens.pageKind: Wix OOI block menu — free parse captures only the $1-off drink deal in the time segment (1 of ~9); the priced HH food items live in sibling block segments only the paid model reaches. v23 enumerate-vs-consolidate case (prompt must NOT fold these into "$8-$14"); also exercises freeUndercapturedOfferings escalation on the assertHasHappyHour path.

goldens.name: Big Finish Wine Tavern
goldens.pageKind: static Squarespace homepage — states a blanket '7x7' deal (7 items for $7 each) with no itemized list on any fetched page; the item list lives only in a linked PDF ('FOOD & DRINK MENU') the extractor doesn't fetch. v24 blanket-deal-notes case: offerings stay [], but the deal mechanic must survive into `notes` instead of vanishing.
